Bridge data shows ANTHROPIC_MODEL=default but UI detects Sonnet due to missing (1M context) marker
After /effort command, button stays dimmed but actual effort level is unknown (no bridge feedback)
Timeline displays multiple sessions merged together without showing fork or plan mode boundaries
Forked session appears empty after creating new tab instead of copying parent conversation
Plan Mode exit doesn't create visible bridge linking back to parent session in ancestry
Session ancestry trace fails; parentUuid references point to messages not in current file
Compact boundary records show logicalParentUuid dangling outside the active session
Application hangs or freezes when traversing parent UUID chain due to undetected cycles
Token counts and session duration metrics show stale values after compaction
Selection cursor disappears from Rewind history menu while pressing UP/DOWN arrows
Pasted text renders as [Pasted text #N] instead of being treated as user input or executed as command
History menu navigation fails silently because active entry is scrolled beyond visible viewport
Danger zone exit confirmation not detected - pressing Ctrl+C second time does not close app
Session ID interception triggers false positives on unrelated command output (grep, cat, Gemini)
DevTools console is flooded with hundreds of [Workspace:RENDER] messages when trying to debug application state
Performance noticeably degrades when DevTools console is open due to excessive logging overhead
Cannot find actual error messages among diagnostic noise without manually scrolling or closing DevTools
Need to dynamically enable or disable logs for specific subsystems at runtime without restarting the application
Custom debug logs added with [MyFeature] tag are not appearing in console because tag is blacklisted by default

explicit: OSC 133 markers and dev server behavior
symptoms: Right-click tab shows no Scripts submenu or scripts list fails to load
RestartZone button (green dot with ↻) missing even though dev process is running
Dev server script (dev/start/serve/watch) doesn't turn tab green or activate RestartZone
Middle-click on RestartZone closes the tab instead of stopping the process
Process stop works from terminal context menu but not from tab context menu (or vice versa)
Tab remains green after dev server stops (commandType not cleared from store)
Scripts submenu appears in one context menu but not the other (inconsistent state between main.js and renderer)
